name: Majesco Insurance Cloud Platform API
what_it_does: Majesco REST API for cloud-native insurance platform covering policy administration, billing, and claims management. Enables AI agents to manage policy lifecycle from quote through endorsement and renewal for P&C and life insurance, handle billing plan creation and payment processing for premium collection, access claims first notice of loss (FNOL) submission and claim lifecycle management, retrieve policy coverages, limits, and endorsement data for insurance operations, manage agent and producer management and commission calculation, handle reinsurance treaty and cession data for financial management, access rating and underwriting decision data for policy issuance automation, retrieve loss run and claims history data for risk assessment, manage digital distribution and self-service portal integration, and integrate insurance platform data with CRM, analytics, and reinsurance platforms.
use_cases: Managing policy lifecycle from underwriting automation agents
Processing claims FNOL from first notice of loss agents
Handling billing and premium collection from finance automation agents
Integrating policy data with CRM from insurance CRM agents
not_for: Non-insurance enterprise software without policy administration and claims focus
Consumer insurance comparison without carrier insurance operations context
Health insurance benefits administration without P&C and life insurance operations
best_when: An insurance carrier using Majesco wants AI agents to automate policy administration, claims processing, billing management, underwriting workflows, and analytics integration.
avoid_when: REGULATORY RISK: Insurance policy and claims automation must comply with state insurance regulations — automated underwriting decisions must follow filed rate and form requirements. Claims processing automation must include fraud detection and human review for complex claims. Policy issuance without required signature and disclosure compliance violates insurance regulations.

auth.notes: Majesco uses OAuth 2.0 authentication. Per-carrier and per-product API credentials. Developer portal at developer.majesco.com. Webhooks for policy and claims events. REST API with JSON responses. Cloud-native SaaS on AWS. Majesco L&AH (life and health) and P&C separate platforms. State regulatory compliance built-in per product line.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual carrier subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; policy volume and product lines determine pricing
pricing.notes: Morristown, New Jersey. Founded 2000. Public company (MJCO, NASDAQ). Insurance technology market. 200+ insurance carriers. Cloud-native P&C and L&AH platforms. Strong in specialty and small-to-mid-size carrier market. Known for cloud-first approach vs. legacy on-premises insurers. Competes with Guidewire and Duck Creek for insurance platform market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: REGULATORY RISK: Insurance policy automation must comply with state rate and form filings; automated underwriting outside filed rates is insurance fraud
P&C vs. L&AH platforms — Majesco has separate platforms for Property & Casualty and Life & Health; APIs and data models differ significantly between product lines
State regulatory compliance — policy issuance automation must include required disclosures and signatures per state; check state-specific insurance regulations before automation
Claims fraud detection — automated FNOL processing must include fraud scoring before payment; skip fraud review increases claims leakage
Reinsurance integration — reinsurance treaty automation requires carrier-specific cession rules; consult actuary before automating reinsurance cession calculations
Webhook for lifecycle events — use webhooks for policy endorsement, cancellation, and claims status changes rather than polling
agent_readiness.security_notes: Insurance platform. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US. Policy, claims, and billing data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance PAS. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US. Policy and claims data.
